calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Order Striking Claim
Off Calendar May-09-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Petitioner People of The State of California's motion to strike claim is ordered off calendar as it was not timely noticed. CCP Section 1005 requires that motions be served and filed 16 court days prior to the hearing, with five calendar days added if the motion was served by mail. As this motion was filed on April 13, 2006 it is untimely. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner'S Firsr Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioner'S First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judical Council Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Mar-10-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Petitioner People of the State of California's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Respondent is ordered to serve complete verified answers without objection within 21 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
